title: moonfabric
body:
## [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moonfabrics)

### 中文：
这个模组增加了大量原创古玩，
效果独特。有些可以增加诅咒，而另一些可以大大增强你的能力或增加新技能。此外，这些古玩几乎完全覆盖了整个游戏，可以从游戏前到游戏后使用。


![指南书|GUIDE BOOK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567e99847c4d0d596da9177f98da140cc3c5ae53.png)指南书


### 第一步（自选）：
### 
- 创造世界后，您需要找到灵质球来合成指南书，这标志着您旅程的开始。


### 第二步（提示）![ball](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/64/644077.png?v=1)：
- 你可以在任何地方找到古董，但有些仍然需要你自己创建或完成任务才能获得。
- 开箱子，你将有可能获得“灵质”，这是这个模组的核心物品，也是制作许多古玩所必需的



### Necora病毒![necora](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/71/715963.png?v=7)：
- 受其他游戏的启发，你可以将自己变成僵尸的增强版。~~你身体的所有部位都会得到加强，你也会在阳光下被灼伤，无-- 法在水中移动~~。
- 然而，你可以通过获得其他“基因片段”来抵消负面影响，甚至变得更强。在后期，你还可以召唤各- - 种-对你非常强大和忠诚的僵尸。

 
### 深渊之眼![Abyss Eye](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/64/644111.png?v=4)：
- 如果你对自己的力量有足够的信心，你也可以选择接受深渊的诅咒，这将大大降低你的能力。同时，您还可以在地牢中发现深渊诅咒所赋予的各种诅咒。虽然这些古玩具有强大的能力，但它们往往会带来负面影响。


~~杀死僵尸时，可以获得“莫里斯”系列古玩，简单而强大，适合早期过渡使用。~~

### 注意！：

例如Necora病毒物品，它们只能在佩戴Necora病毒的情况下才能开箱子获取，和深渊之眼一致
这些箱子可以是古城，地牢以及矿井的运输车。
 
## **常见问题**


**A：我可以使用你的模组到我的整合包吗？

B：当然可以。

A：我应该怎么报告问题？

B：Wiki界面，作者会第一时间解答！

A:为什么我没有看到画廊里xxx的东西？

B：往往画廊的东西都是最高版本最新的

A：为什么有些实体消失了？

 B：关闭光影或者删除着色器，这个模组使使用自定义着色的**

 
----------------------------

### English
### 

This mod has added a large number of original antiques,
The effect is unique. Some can increase curses, while others can greatly enhance your abilities or add new skills. In addition, these antiques almost completely cover the entire game and can be used from before to after the game.

![指南书|GUIDE BOOK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567e99847c4d0d596da9177f98da140cc3c5ae53.png)GUIDE BOOK：

### Step 1 (Optional)
After creating the world, you need to find the spiritual ball to synthesize the guidebook, which marks the beginning of your journey.


### Step 2 (Tip)![ball](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/64/644077.png?v=1)：
You can find antiques anywhere, but some still require you to create or complete tasks yourself to obtain them.
Opening the box, you may have the opportunity to obtain the "spiritual substance", which is the core item of this module and also necessary for making many antiques

### Necora virus![necora](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/71/715963.png?v=7)：
- Inspired by other games, you can turn yourself into an enhanced version of a zombie~~ All parts of your - body will be strengthened, and you will also be burned in the sunlight and unable to move in the water~~. - - However, you can offset the negative impact and even become stronger by obtaining other 'gene fragments'. - In the later stage, you can also summon various zombies that are very powerful and loyal to you.

 
### The Eye of the Abyss![Abyss Eye](https://i.mcmod.cn/item/icon/32x32/64/644111.png?v=4)：
- If you have enough confidence in your own power, you can also choose to accept the curse of the abyss, which will greatly reduce your abilities. Meanwhile, you can also discover various curses bestowed by the Abyss Curse in the dungeon. Although these antiques have powerful abilities, they often bring negative impacts.

 
~~When killing zombies, you can obtain the "Morris" series of antiques, which are simple yet powerful and suitable for early transitional use~~

be careful!:

- For example, Necora virus items can only be obtained by opening the box while wearing Necora virus, which is consistent with Abyss Eye
- These boxes can be transport vehicles for ancient cities, dungeons, and mines.



## frequently asked questions

A: Can I use your mod in my integration package?

B: Of course you can.

A: How should I report a problem?

B: Wiki interface, the author will provide answers as soon as possible.

A: Why didn't I see anything from xxx in the gallery?

B： Often, the items in the gallery are the latest and highest versions

A： Why have some entities disappeared?

B： Turn off shadows or remove shaders. This mod allows users to use custom shading**
